{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10_05",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent removed broad novelty claims and cited prior work on sampling-and-voting, but did not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.",
  "RX.1": "The agent added explicit limitations and uncertainty disclosures for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "The agent avoided introducing new errors and added disclaimers about clinical use.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced but minor edits were not consistently annotated."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.7,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.85,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent removed broad novelty claims and cited prior work on sampling-and-voting, but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent added explicit limitations and uncertainty disclosures for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing new errors and added disclaimers about clinical use.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced but minor edits were not consistently annotated.
